## Checklist

- [ ] OpenAPI spec linted: `make lint-openapi`
- [ ] SDKs regenerated if spec changed: `make generate`
- [ ] Plugin manifests linted if plugins changed: `make lint-plugin`
- [ ] SDK tests pass: `make test` (or per-language test commands)
- [ ] US English spelling
